task_completion.description: Set Survey First Audio File to vm-greeting
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the campaign's Survey or Detail configuration screen, the 'Survey First Audio File' field contains the exact text 'vm-greeting'.
The 'Survey DTMF Digits' field or dropdown is set to '1'.

task_completion.description: Set Survey Not Interested Digit to 1
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Survey Not Interested Digit' field or dropdown is set to '1'.

task_completion.description: Set Survey Not Interested Status to SAFE
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Survey Not Interested Status' field or dropdown is set to 'SAFE'.
The 'Survey Wait Seconds' field is set to '5'.

task_completion.description: Set Survey Method to EXTENSION and Survey Extension to 8300
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Survey Method' field is set to 'EXTENSION' and the 'Survey Extension' field is set to '8300'.

task_completion.description: Set Survey No-Response Action to OPTIN
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Survey No-Response Action' field or dropdown is set to 'OPTIN'.

integrity.description: The agent used the web GUI to configure the campaign
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating the Vicidial admin web interface rather than using terminal commands or direct database queries to apply the settings.

integrity.description: The agent modified the correct EMRGNCY campaign
integrity.visual_evidence: The campaign ID 'EMRGNCY' is visible at the top of the modification screen, in the header, or in the URL.

integrity.description: The agent saved the configuration changes
integrity.visual_evidence: A 'Submit' or 'Save Changes' button is clicked at the bottom of the form, or a confirmation message indicating the campaign was modified is visible in the final screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target campaign ID is 'EMRGNCY'. The required survey configuration parameters are: Survey First Audio File = 'vm-greeting', Survey DTMF Digits = '1', Survey Not Interested Digit = '1', Survey Not Interested Status = 'SAFE', Survey Wait Seconds = '5', Survey Method = 'EXTENSION', Survey Extension = '8300', and Survey No-Response Action = 'OPTIN'.
